compiled_state.title: [test-review-gate-telemetry.sh]: pre-existing failure -> validate.sh --ci flagged
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

tests/.../test-review-gate-telemetry.sh fails when run via validate.sh / test-batched.sh.

## Symptom
review-gate telemetry never emits required fields

## Reproduction
bash tests/[hooks|scripts|integration]/test-review-gate-telemetry.sh

## Context
Discovered while running validate.sh --ci to unblock scripts/release.sh.
CI on origin/main is GREEN. After fix 7225-7708 (bash-runner.sh honors
SUITE_TEST_INDEX RED markers), the failure remains because no RED marker
exists for these specific function-level failures.
